properties.Test Case: In Libre Office, copy a image, paste in Bloom. Check resulting file size. We have special code to prevent it being huge when copied out of Libre Office. Do this with a line drawing and also a photo.
properties.Steps: In Libre Office, copy a image, paste in Bloom. Check resulting file size. We have special code to prevent it being huge when copied out of Libre Office. Do this with a line drawing and also a photo.

properties.Test Case: Exercise the Image Copy, Cut & Paste buttons. [N.B. BL-13391 slated for Bloom 6.1] [Cut no longer exists in 6.2 and later]
properties.Steps: - Exercise the Image Copy, Cut & Paste buttons. [N.B. BL-13391 slated for Bloom 6.1] [Cut no longer exists in 6.2 and later]

properties.Test Case: Try importing images which have special characters, esp. "&". Print PDF. Test Publishing. Test Restarting Bloom.
properties.Steps: Try importing images which have special characters, esp. "&". Print PDF. Test Publishing. Test Restarting Bloom.

properties.Test Case: Rename c:\programdata\sil\Art Of reading (for AOR 3.2) or c:\programdata\sil\ImageCollections (for subsequent AORs). Attempt to add AOR image. Should get a message "this computer doesn't appear to have any galleries installed yet. Download Art of Readering Installer). Ensure hyperlink works.
properties.Steps: - Rename c:\programdata\sil\Art Of reading (for AOR 3.2) or c:\programdata\sil\ImageCollections (for subsequent AORs). Attempt to add AOR image. Should get a message "this computer doesn't appear to have any galleries installed yet. Download Art of Readering Installer). Ensure hyperlink works.
